response.step_by_step_log:
1. Watched the video and identified the characters as Hololive Advent. The background song played throughout in intermittent segments.
2. The song was identified as 'Seishun no Archive' by 40mP, commonly associated with the 'Blue Archive' franchise.
3. Used the search string '"Seishun no Archive" 40mP Japanese and English lyrics' to find the lyrics.
4. Mapped the vocal performance scenes based on when the characters are actively singing, separated by dialogue interruptions.
5. Structured the scenes in the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: A video featuring the Hololive Advent VTuber group (Fuwawa Abyssgard, Mococo Abyssgard, Nerissa Ravencroft, Shiori Novella, Koseki Bijou) on a beach, performing a choreographed dance to 'Seishun no Archive' (originally by 40mP for Blue Archive), with intermittent dialogue involving a character named Pokey.

scenes.description: The Hololive Advent characters perform a choreographed dance and sing 'Seishun no Archive' on a beach.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
あたらしい景色が見たくて自転車を漕いだ
ただ同じ場所で止まっていた日々から抜け出して
屋上サボって寝転んで青空を見下ろした
クジラみたいな雲が形を変えていく
返さないほどの過去を抱えたまま
砂だらけの世界で分け合うジュースの味
一人きりじゃきっと
みんながいなきゃきっと
笑うことも泣くこともできない運命共同体
世界中の記憶がいつか
砂のように消えてしまっても
空と海と風と君がそこに在れば
青春は終わんない
守るべき理由はいつも単純明快
この場所が私たちの
たった一つの居場所だから
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I rode my bicycle wanting to see a new view,
Just wanting to break free from the days of standing still in the same place.
I skipped out on work, lay down, and looked down at the blue sky.
Clouds like whales go on changing their shapes.
While holding onto a past I can't return to,
The taste of the juice we share in this sand-filled world.
I'm sure if I were alone,
I'm sure if you weren't there,
We wouldn't be able to laugh or cry, we're bound by fate.
Even if the memories of the whole world
Were to disappear like sand someday,
As long as the sky, the sea, the wind, and you are there,
Our youth will never end.
The reason we have to protect this is always simple and clear,
Because this place is the only place
Where we belong.

scenes.description: The characters resume singing and dancing after a brief dialogue segment.
